description: A production planner must adjust the master production schedule due to a supplier delay for a critical component.

nodes.task_description: Receive notification of a 2-week delay for a specific part from a supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the delayed part and the affected aircraft units.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the production schedule to identify all downstream tasks that will be impacted by the delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of all affected work orders and assembly steps.

nodes.task_description: Update the master production schedule, shifting the impacted tasks and notifying the affected production teams of the new timeline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully revises and publishes the new schedule.
